title: Demon Soul
lyrics: I see the shadows in your eyes, a storm you're trying to disguise Words unspoken, hearts are broken, we're lost in a web of lies A web of lies, every whisper echoes pain, caught in a lovers chain Falling deeper, our souls weaker, trying to end this cold refrain that our communication lays We're spinning out of time, trying to find a sign, but the past won't set us free I can see the demons in your soul, taking hold, losing all control Every touch feels like a curse, we're trapped in this universe, memories linger like a bitter sting Our love, a forgotten verse of silent screams with sleepless nights I don't wanna wait for you no more, it's like I'm always running back and forth You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul And I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul I can see the demons in your soul, taking hold, with two hearts and a broken dream Haunted by things we can't redeem You used to be my light, now darkness fills the night We're fighting battles we can't see, and the scars run too fucking deep Love's a fire burning low, but we can't let it go, the demons won't let us be whole I don't wanna wait for you no more, it's like I'm always running back and forth You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home  Never wanna let go, never wanna let go I don't wanna wait for you no more, it's like I'm always running back and forth You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul All your soul, out from what you really should be Take some time and connect yourself to your own purpose, I love you Thanks for watching!

lyricsSegments.text: I see the shadows in your eyes, a storm you're trying to disguise
Words unspoken, hearts are broken, we're lost in a web of lies
A web of lies, every whisper echoes pain, caught in a lovers chain
Falling deeper, our souls weaker, trying to end this cold refrain that our communication lays
We're spinning out of time, trying to find a sign, but the past won't set us free
I can see the demons in your soul, taking hold, losing all control
Every touch feels like a curse, we're trapped in this universe, memories linger like a bitter sting
Our love, a forgotten verse of silent screams with sleepless nights
I don't wanna wait for you no more, it's like I'm always running back and forth
You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul
And I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home
You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul
I can see the demons in your soul, taking hold, with two hearts and a broken dream
Haunted by things we can't redeem
You used to be my light, now darkness fills the night
We're fighting battles we can't see, and the scars run too fucking deep
Love's a fire burning low, but we can't let it go, the demons won't let us be whole
I don't wanna wait for you no more, it's like I'm always running back and forth
You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul
I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home
You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul
I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home
Never wanna let go, never wanna let go
I don't wanna wait for you no more, it's like I'm always running back and forth
You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul
I don't wanna keep this up no more, it's like you're always loving me from home
You'll never let me in, there's no way I will win, the battle's with the demons in your soul
All your soul, out from what you really should be
Take some time and connect yourself to your own purpose, I love you
Thanks for watching!
